texto: There is so much I could say about myself, but I wish you know only this; at times I may be bitter, at times I may be sweet; do not judge me on one character or the other. I have more facets than a jewel, I ask that you understand all of me before you judge me. No one side of my personality is bigger than another, just as no one emotion claims me all the time.
explicacao: Citação de K.K. Cook sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “There is so much I could say about myself, but I wish you know only this; at times I may be bitte…” articula reflexao, life-lesson, times em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Be weary of the unknown inside of every human being, but do not fear it, embrace it.
explicacao: Citação de K.K. Cook sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Be weary of the unknown inside of every human being, but do not fear it, embrace it.” articula vida, human, lesson em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como lesson e vida.
